reviews.review_text: Expensive for day visitors to water park

Great facilities, clean and very well maintained. I loved that we had a site that overlooked the jetty/landing area in Cudgera creek, where we could leave the kayak or boat tired up overnight and easily see it from our van. Some great fishing in the creek behind the park as well as across the road in the surf.
Beautiful spot on the point at Tweed.
This is our favourite caravan park and our go to spot whenever we can string 4 nights together. Staff are amazing and facilities are always clean. Sites are a good size. Easy walk to beach and creek
Lovely little park across from the ocean and liverlooking the river. Very pretty. Modern very clean amenities. Slabs for caravans. About 5 km from Pottsville.

A nice little park, right across the road from beach access and also right on Cudgera Creek. The staff were super friendly, the sites are reasonably sized and mostly level, the amenities are fairly new and cleaned thoroughly, the camp kitchen is neat if a little basic (but has the essentials). It does have a bit of road noise during the day but is reasonably quiet at night. Lots of choices for a feed locally as well...
The amenities are the cleanest I've seen. Very impressive and right across the road is the beautiful ocean and inlet.

Great little Caravan Park.  Well maintained by the people who manage it. Friendly & helpful.  Our 2nd visit to the park, current management were just about to takeover.  Well done, great job.  Hastings point  is a great spot for swimming & fishing.
Staff here were so lovely and helpful!!
Great van site.
Beautiful place for a visit
Powered site opposite the creek which is fantastic at high tide. Good park fairly good price, lovely clean tidy park and amenities spot on, have been before and will come again.

Wonderful location for a quick stay with the kids. Staff were very helpful on arrival. The location is great- close to the creek and a small playground for the kids. The sites are well kept and a good size.
My only issue is the roadway that you camp next to us quite busy so you can hear some traffic. Nothing that can be helped by the park itself. The view and location absolutely make up for it. We would stay again with two toddlers
great location!! however, the couple at reception were very rude and uninviting don’t think we’ll be back any time soon.
Amazing caravan park, always clean and great hosts. The beach and Cudgen Creek are great for swimming and relaxing.
Fantastic park straight across from the beautiful beach. Friendly and kind management. Amenities are kept immaculate and caravan site was great. Highly recommend!
Amazing management here, great location with the river behind and beach in front. Sometimes rude park goers but for the most part everyone is super lovely!

I had a great holiday at Tweed Holiday Parks Hastings Point in December 2024. Great facilities !  I was able to interact with the wonderful wildlife that visited my site daily . Catching fish and crabs daily was an exceptional experience .
John and Michelle (mangers) and Jodie , made me feel very welcome, and shared their knowledge of the area in great detail.
This holiday was a once in a lifetime experience, chiefly because of the mangers who went above and beyond the call of duty in providing service for their guests.

Such a beautiful location and wonderful facilities. What a shame the managers seem to do everything possible to make the stay unenjoyable. From the second we checked in with the cranky old lady at reception we were on edge the whole stay. What a shame. Wouldn't bother returning for that very reason, tonnes of better parks to visit
Absolutely amazing.. we love it here .. our 2 small children love it here ❤️

One of the best places we have stayed in our camper trailer. One of the permanent sites was extremely helpful and a very nice person when we had a storm and they helped us out with sand pegs to hold our annex down. The corner shop has great food and great coffee. The beach and river super close and picturesque! Can’t wait to stay there again!!
We stayed in our own caravan on a water view site.  Management were very helpful and friendly. The amenities were very clean and tidy. We loved our stay here and will be back.

We had a lovely family holiday and the park. The mangers of the park were so friendly and helpful. It’s a great location with the beach across the road. The ammenities were very clean and AMZING showers. Even had live music  on the Sunday. Kids could ride around and make friends with others. Definitely coming back.

Beautiful Sunny Mornings
Blue Ocean
Relaxing

Stayed here for the weekend on a water view site and had a beautiful view of the river with easy access. I also had some family members stay in one of the safari tents and they were clean and spacious. The toilets were also tidy and close to our site. Would definitely recommend as the beach is right across the road.

Absoulte loved every moment
Beach was amazing
And the atmosphere
Great little caravan park friendly staff spotless amenities block .have stayed here before always good time

Just got back from the best weekend away!!! Communication from the park before and during stay has been fabulous, messages to advise of food trucks on site, free kids activities or toys at reception, early check in availability etc. Coffee van and food trucks were great. Staff very friendly. Sites large and well kept. Plenty of grass. Facilities, amenities and the park in feral were fabulous. Very clean, modern and in good repair. Close walk to beach and the best general store we’ve ever been to. Can’t wait to come back here!!!
The place is on Cudgera Creek, backing onto the ocean. The view is amazing and the facilities are kept neat and tidy. Friendly people and no troubles at all!

Great place to stay with the family. We have been coming here for about 10  years. The beach and creek are just across the road if you want to go for a swim or fish.  The Headlands is just a short walk away with magnificent views where you can occasionally see dolphins and whales.
Great caravan park, and I will definitely return again. Thanks heaps to the owner John for the caravan tips.

A pleasant place to camp with a sea view. There is some road noise, but it is conveniently located opposite a creek and beach. Friendly, hard-working staff. Good amenities. It's best to call to make a booking.
Great holiday park in an awesome location. The facilities are excellent. The only negative is the road noise at night.

Tweed Holiday Park Hasting Point is a great caravan park. It’s in a great location with a awesome general store next to it and the beach is just across the road. It’s only 5 minutes to both Cabarita and Pottsville which makes it easy to explore around Northern NSW. The only down side was that the amenities block had its light turned off at 6am in the morning, which did mean a few showers in the dark until the sun came up enough to provide enough light into the block.

Clean facilities, friendly park.
No complaints from my group.
Best spot over the road from the beach.
Lovely smaller caravan park. Great location.
Wonderful park with great views of the beach and easy access to everything. Staff were very friendly and helpful. It was a great relaxing weekend. 😁

Such a shame the glamping tent was facing the toilet block instead of the water. It makes no sense why you would do this? Especially given the direction of the ocean breezes and the rain. It soaks all the undercover outdoor seating area and there is no room inside for 4 people to sit down and eat a meal. It would have been so much nicer if it was facing the water and we could have enjoyed time outside whilst there.
We had a great stay at the park. Everything was tidy and the managers were lovely. We will be returning!
Excellent facilities

Horrible camp ground. No privacy between camp sites. Very basic amenities. Just do yourself a favour and go to North Star camping ground which is 800 metres away. I'm never coming back to this place again.

Stayed on a caravan site, great location to surf beach and the river mouth for stand up paddle boards.amenities always clean.
Highly recommend.

Sehr nahe an der Strasse.
Saubere einrichtung, freundliches Personal

Wonderful stay at Hastings Point! Great location across the road from the beach, perfect inlet with no big waves. Amenities were clean and good BBQ facilities. Friendly staff too! Will definitely be staying again.
Great location
Great place to take van and do nothing but enjoy the location
Fantastic little van park about 30m across the road from the beach with a great kids park.  Highly recomend 👍😁

Amazing location, everything is clean, awesome bbq area, creek access, Eagles nest, fishing, surf, everything you need. Amazing layout, pleanty of room to park campers and caravans, great facilities. Favourite place to camp.
Great little park, sadly right on the highway. This is due to the size of our caravan. Still getting a great view of the beach. Everyone has been very friendly. 🙂
Great camp kitchen.
Just want to acknowledge the amazing Michelle at reception at Hastings point caravan park. Thanks for making our stay so good. A great park, superior amenities and close to great beaches. Thanks.
Absolutely fabulous location, small but  very nice Caravan Park. Managers are very friendly and helpful.
Always love the Hastings Point vibe, super chilled, lovely management, right across from the beach.

Stayed for a few nights in late May during a “Motorhome” hire trial sort of thing! The managers were really helpful getting us sorted & comfortable. The location is incredible. The amenities were spotless. Thank you for making our short stay so brilliant. We look forward to staying again soon. Cheers.

We’ve made Hastings Point Tweed Holiday park and annual occurrence now but more specifically on this occasion we had Warren & Maureen as reliving park managers and they made our stay just that extra bit special. Our kids loved Maureen and she just went that extra mile to make sure we were comfortable. If you’re looking for reliving park managers in the future, these guys go above and beyond. We wanted to follow them around 😆
The Safari tents have been renovated and they’re awesome with a new aircon fitted. Amenities are well kept & clean. Right on the beach. Right near a playground. Directly across from the lookout. Can’t be faulted. See you again next year.
Vu sur lac d'un côté et mer de l'autre, avec toutes les commodités si vous êtes en tente ou van. Très propre et l'accueil fabuleux !! Je recommande
Just visited but brilliant setting
